title: The Crew Reacts to a Former Enemy
description: On pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this part focuses on a new crewmate and a new mystery. Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
scene: This scene belongs to the A New Crewmate and a New Mystery sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Then I could at least bounce'em back!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Can't we do some- thing about this?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: They won't break their forma-tion at all!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Who's that guy on the left again...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: At last, we've crossed paths again!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now look closely at this ring!

summary: Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
